_comment: M5 lineage: item provenance + revoked sources. 'derived_from' maps each item to the items it was DERIVED FROM (child -> parents). 'revoked' lists revoked SOURCE item ids; revocation propagates transitively to every item derived from them. The loader (memory.py) inverts this graph and computes the full revoked set ONCE at load time, so the bouncer just does a set lookup. JSON has no comments, so this '_comment' key is ignored by the loader.
